channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Ukraine poised to take war to Belarus after ultimatum over Russian drone attacks  Washington Times

  5. Lukashenko says he warned Ukraine not to drag Belarus into war  Reuters

item.title: MS NOW’s longest serving anchor is out as network fills schedule with podcasts - New York Post
item.description:
1. MS NOW’s longest serving anchor is out as network fills schedule with podcasts  New York Post

item.title: Boy, 12, saved by older brother after shark attack 60 miles offshore on Bahamas family vacation - New York Post
item.description:
1. Boy, 12, saved by older brother after shark attack 60 miles offshore on Bahamas family vacation  New York Post
  2. Friendswood boy attacked by shark in the Bahamas says brother saved his life: 'It could have been fatal'  KHOU
  3. ‘I could see my bone’: Friendswood boy survives shark attack in Bahamas after brother rushes to save him  Click2Houston
  4. 12-Year-Old Boy Rescued by His Brother After Shark Attack on Family Vacation: ‘I Could See My Bone'  People.com
  5. 12-year-old boy attacked by shark while swimming in Bahamas - National  Global News

item.title: Ukraine's drones take the war to Russia - Axios
item.description:
1. Ukraine's drones take the war to Russia  Axios
  2. As the Tide Turns Against Putin, Beware the Drowning Man  Foreign Policy
  3. As Ukraine seizes ‘first chance to win’, war horrors come home to Russia  Al Jazeera
  4. Ukraine is raising the cost of war for Russia — and testing Putin's resolve  CNBC
  5. Why Does Putin Fiddle While Russia Burns? That's How the System Works.  The Moscow Times

item.title: Lukashenko and Putin Hold Unannounced Meeting Following Minsk Demands to Avoid War Involvement - UNITED24 Media
item.description:

  5. Putin, Łukašenka said to be in second day of talks  Позірк

item.title: Russian citizens told "switch to Android" after Apple blocks key Russian apps - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Russian citizens told "switch to Android" after Apple blocks key Russian apps  Ars Technica

  4. Russia accuses Apple of ‘political censorship’ after VK apps removed from App Store  The Record from Recorded Future News
